items.title_zh: WorkBuddy：微信里的AI专家团队工作流
items.summary_zh: WorkBuddy：WorkBuddy是一款可在微信中使用的AI工作流产品，支持多个AI专家角色协同作业，覆盖运营策略、选题、内容生产等环节。用户可通过配置AI角色分工，在微信内完成自媒体内容全流程，并支持定时推送AI热点摘要等自动化功能。

items.title_zh: 昆仑万维Mureka V8登顶全球AI音乐模型榜
items.summary_zh: 昆仑万维：昆仑万维旗下AI音乐模型Mureka V8在Artificial Analysis音乐模型榜单中登顶，超越Suno V4.5、Udio v1.5 Allegro等国际主流模型，实现人声（vocal）与器乐（instrument）双项第一。测试显示其在低复杂度提示词下也具备较强的理解和生成能力。

items.title_zh: AI全链路加持！一加15T打造全能小屏，售价4299元起
items.summary_zh: 量子位：一加全新小屏旗舰一加 15T 正式发布，搭载第五代骁龙 8 至尊版处理器与 ColorOS 16 系统，全面集成 AI 功能。机型配备 6.32 英寸屏幕、7500mAh 大电池及 LUMO 凝光影像系统，165Hz 高帧游戏体验，售价 4299 元起。

items.title_en: Anthropic's Claude Code and Cowork can control your computer
items.title_zh: Anthropic Claude Code 与 Cowork 现可控制电脑
items.summary_en: Anthropic: Anthropic has announced that Claude Code and its new Cowork feature can now control computers directly, enabling GUI-level automation tasks. The capability allows Claude to interact with desktop applications and perform complex multi-step workflows on behalf of users.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic：Anthropic 宣布 Claude Code 及新功能 Cowork 现可直接控制电脑，实现 GUI 级别的自动化操作，让 Claude 能够与桌面应用程序交互并代替用户执行复杂的多步骤工作流。

items.title_en: Anthropic's Claude Code and Cowork can control your computer
items.title_zh: Anthropic Claude Code 与 Cowork 获得电脑控制能力
items.summary_en: Anthropic: Anthropic has expanded Claude Code and its Cowork collaboration tool with computer use capabilities, allowing the AI to autonomously control desktop applications and perform complex multi-step tasks. The update brings agentic capabilities directly into developer workflows.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic：Anthropic 为 Claude Code 和协作工具 Cowork 新增了电脑控制功能，使 AI 能够自主操作桌面应用程序并执行复杂的多步骤任务，将智能体能力直接融入开发者工作流。

items.title_zh: 龙虾爆火之后，AI初创的全球化机会来了吗？｜线下沙龙报名
items.summary_zh: 量子位：量子位将于 3 月 26 日举办 AI 初创全球化线下沙龙，邀请小影科技、FluxA、谷歌、京东、声网、Meshy 等企业分享出海实践经验，面向有全球化意向的 AI 创业团队开放报名。

items.title_en: Mirage raises $75M to continue building models for its AI video editing app Captions
items.title_zh: Mirage 融资 7500 万美元，继续开发 AI 视频编辑应用 Captions
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: Mirage has raised $75 million to further develop AI models powering its video editing application Captions. The funding will be used to advance its AI-driven video production capabilities and expand the app's features for creators.
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：Mirage 完成 7500 万美元融资，将用于进一步开发其视频编辑应用 Captions 背后的 AI 模型，推进 AI 驱动的视频制作能力，并为创作者拓展更多功能。

items.title_en: Agile Robots becomes the latest robotics company to partner with Google DeepMind
items.title_zh: Agile Robots 成为最新与 Google DeepMind 合作的机器人公司
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: Agile Robots has announced a partnership with Google DeepMind, joining a growing list of robotics companies collaborating with the AI research lab. The partnership aims to integrate DeepMind's AI capabilities into Agile Robots' humanoid and legged robot platforms.
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：Agile Robots 宣布与 Google DeepMind 建立合作关系，加入越来越多与该 AI 研究实验室合作的机器人公司行列，旨在将 DeepMind 的 AI 能力整合到其人形及腿足机器人平台。

items.title_zh: OpenAI基金会最新动态
items.summary_en: OpenAI: The OpenAI Foundation announces plans to invest at least $1 billion across four mission areas including curing diseases, jobs and economic impact, AI resilience, and supporting communities, marking a major philanthropic expansion following recapitalization.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI：OpenAI基金会宣布计划在四个使命领域投资至少10亿美元，包括治愈疾病、就业与经济影响、AI韧性以及社区支持，标志着公司重组后的重大慈善扩张。

items.title_zh: ChatGPT推出沉浸式购物产品发现功能
items.summary_en: OpenAI: ChatGPT launches richer, visually immersive shopping experiences powered by the Agentic Commerce Protocol, enabling product discovery, side-by-side comparisons, and deeper merchant integration within the chat interface.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI：ChatGPT推出基于Agentic Commerce Protocol的沉浸式购物体验，支持产品发现、对比购物及商家深度集成，进一步强化AI购物助手能力。

items.title_en: Helping developers build safer AI experiences for teens
items.title_zh: OpenAI发布青少年AI安全策略，助力开发者构建更安全的产品
items.summary_en: OpenAI: OpenAI released open-source prompt-based teen safety policies designed for use with gpt-oss-safeguard. The policies cover six risk areas including violent/sexual content, harmful body ideals, dangerous activities, roleplay, and age-restricted goods, helping developers build age-appropriate AI protections for young users without starting from scratch. Developed with input from Common Sense Media and everyone.ai.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI：OpenAI发布基于提示词的青少年安全策略，可直接与gpt-oss-safeguard配合使用。策略涵盖暴力/色情内容、有害体型观念、危险活动、角色扮演、限龄商品六大风险领域，帮助开发者在开源生态中为未成年用户构建年龄适配的安全保护机制。策略由Common Sense Media等机构参与制定，并通过ROOST Model Community开源发布。

items.title_en: Anthropic hands Claude Code more control, but keeps it on a leash
items.title_zh: Anthropic为Claude Code新增自动模式，扩大自主执行权限
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: Anthropic has launched auto mode for Claude Code, enabling the AI agent to execute multi-step development tasks with fewer manual approvals. The update reflects a broader industry trend toward more autonomous agentic coding tools, while Anthropic maintains safety guardrails to limit unintended actions.
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：Anthropic为Claude Code推出自动模式，允许AI代理自主完成多步骤开发任务，减少人工审批环节。此举体现了AI编程工具走向更高自主性的行业趋势，但Anthropic仍保留安全限制。

items.title_en: Agile Robots becomes the latest robotics company to partner with Google DeepMind
items.title_zh: Agile Robots与Google DeepMind合作，引入机器人基础模型
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: Agile Robots has announced a partnership with Google DeepMind to integrate DeepMind's robotics foundation models into its robots. The collaboration also involves data collection to advance DeepMind's AI research, making Agile Robots the latest in a growing list of robotics firms teaming up with the AI lab.
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：Agile Robots宣布与Google DeepMind合作，将DeepMind机器人基础模型集成到其机器人产品中，同时为DeepMind AI研究提供数据支持，成为又一家与该AI实验室携手的机器人企业。

items.title_en: OpenAI just gave up on Sora and its billion-dollar Disney deal
items.title_zh: OpenAI宣布关停Sora并终止与迪士尼的合作
items.summary_en: The Verge: OpenAI is winding down its Sora AI video generation model and app, and ending a recently-announced partnership with Disney, marking a significant strategic retreat from the AI video generation market just 25 months after Sora's debut.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：OpenAI宣布关停Sora AI视频生成模型及应用，并终止与迪士尼的合作协议，距Sora发布仅25个月，是OpenAI在AI视频赛道的重大战略退出。

items.title_en: Arm's first CPU ever will plug into Meta's AI data centers later this year
items.title_zh: Arm首款自研CPU将于年内接入Meta的AI数据中心
items.summary_en: The Verge: Arm is launching its first in-house designed CPU called the AGI CPU, which will be deployed by Meta in its AI data centers later this year, signaling Arm's strategic move from licensing architecture to building its own silicon.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：Arm发布首款自研CPU（命名为AGI CPU），将于年内部署在Meta的AI数据中心，标志着Arm从授权架构向自研芯片的战略转型。

items.title_en: Show HN: ProofShot – Give AI coding agents eyes to verify the UI they build
items.title_zh: ProofShot：为AI编程智能体提供UI视觉验证能力
items.summary_en: ProofShot: ProofShot is an open tool that gives AI coding agents visual verification capabilities for the UIs they generate. It enables agents to capture screenshots of their output and compare actual vs. intended UI state, helping detect visual discrepancies without manual review. Submitted as a Show HN project.
items.summary_zh: ProofShot：ProofShot是一款为AI编程智能体提供UI视觉验证能力的开源工具。该工具使智能体能够截图并检查自身生成的界面，帮助识别实际UI与预期之间的视觉差异，降低人工审核成本。

items.title_en: Pool spare GPU capacity to run LLMs at larger scale
items.title_zh: 聚合闲置GPU算力以更大规模运行大语言模型
items.summary_en: Hacker News: An open-source project, mesh-llm, proposes pooling idle GPU capacity across machines to run large language models at greater scale without dedicated infrastructure. The approach enables distributed LLM inference by treating spare compute as a shared mesh network.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：开源项目mesh-llm提出将多台机器闲置GPU算力汇集起来，无需专属基础设施即可大规模运行大语言模型，将空余算力视为共享网格网络，实现分布式LLM推理。

items.title_en: Show HN: ProofShot – Give AI coding agents eyes to verify the UI they build
items.title_zh: ProofShot：让AI编程Agent能看见并验证自己构建的UI
items.summary_en: Hacker News: ProofShot is a new tool that provides AI coding agents with visual verification capabilities, allowing them to take screenshots and validate that the UI they generate matches intended designs. The Show HN post highlights growing demand for closed-loop feedback in AI-assisted software development.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：ProofShot是一款为AI编程Agent提供视觉验证能力的新工具，使其能截图并确认自动生成的UI是否符合预期设计，体现了AI辅助软件开发中对闭环反馈机制的迫切需求。

items.title_zh: 黄仁勋暴论核弹：AGI已经实现，Ilya错了，程序员有10亿
items.summary_zh: 量子位：英伟达CEO黄仁勋抛出重磅论断，称AGI已经实现，并直言Ilya Sutskever关于预训练触顶的判断是错的，认为合成数据将进一步推动数据规模扩张。他预测全球将出现10亿级AI程序员，并强调推理计算比预训练更难、更重要，引发业界广泛讨论。

items.title_zh: RoboChallenge Table30 V2 正式发布，泛化时代开幕
items.summary_zh: 量子位：具身智能评测基准RoboChallenge Table30 V2正式发布，新增18个双臂灵巧操作任务，总计30个高难度任务，专注考核模型泛化能力。新版本重构了学习与测试协议，终结了为比赛调参的旧模式，旨在为全球具身智能研究者提供公平开放的真机竞技场。
